courses.title: Burrata e Fichi
courses.desc: Hand-pulled Puglian burrata, roasted black mission figs, prosciutto di Parma, aged balsamic, wood-grilled bread.

courses.title: Risotto ai Funghi
courses.desc: Carnaroli rice, wild porcini and cremini mushrooms, Parmigiano Reggiano, fresh thyme, brown butter finish.

courses.title: Branzino al Forno
courses.desc: Whole-roasted Mediterranean branzino, lemon and herbs, Castelvetrano olives, Tuscan white beans, salsa verde.

addon.title: Wine Pairing
addon.desc: Three wines, one per course, chosen by the floor

policy_line: No split checks. · Gratuity of 22% for parties of 6 or more.
